title: F-008 最终收敛验证 (tsc + knip + 全测 + theme-parity + 全 NO_COLOR snapshot + grep no picocolors)
description: Goal-backward final verification gate for W3-B. F-008 (per-surface NO_COLOR snapshots) is satisfied incrementally inside TASK-003/004/005/006; this task is the green-gate that asserts the whole reskin landed coherently: typecheck clean, knip clean, full CLI test suite green (including theme-parity + all four per-surface NO_COLOR snapshots + the @clack wrap snapshot), picocolors fully gone, and the structural primitives are actually wired into every reskinned surface. No new feature code — verification + any small fix-ups + final commit on feat/w3b-vivid-reskin.
action: Run the full gate from repo root: `pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit` (exit 0), `pnpm lint` (knip --strict, exit 0), `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test` (all green incl. theme-parity + doctor-reskin + install-renderer-reskin + hud-reskin + theme-clack snapshots). Census-grep that every reskin surface wires a structural primitive (sectionBar/tree/grid/scopeBadge) and that picocolors is gone (grep -rn picocolors across packages/cli returns only zero-or-comment-free). Confirm theme.ts 7-token PALETTE values unchanged (git diff). Verify @clack prompt controls untouched (grep text()/select()/confirm()/multiselect() call-site count unchanged vs main). Fix any small failures inline; final incremental commit.

criteria: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test exits 0 (theme-parity + doctor-reskin + install-renderer-reskin + hud-reskin + theme-clack all green)
all four per-surface NO_COLOR snapshot files exist under packages/cli/__tests__/__snapshots__ (doctor-reskin, install-renderer-reskin, hud-reskin, theme-clack)
structural primitives are wired in every reskin surface: grep finds sectionBar in doctor.ts, ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts, theme-clack.ts, and knowledge-hint-broad.cjs
git diff packages/shared/src/theme.ts shows no change to any '[38;2;' palette value line
@clack control call-site count (grep -rc -E 'text\(|select\(|confirm\(|multiselect\(' packages/cli/src) equals the pre-W3-B count on main
convergence.verification: pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm lint && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test && grep -rn picocolors packages/cli || true
convergence.definition_of_done: The entire W3-B reskin is green and coherent: typecheck + knip + full suite pass, every surface renders via structural primitives, all NO_COLOR snapshots are committed, picocolors is gone, the 7-token palette and @clack controls are untouched.

files.change: Confirm doctor-reskin / install-renderer-reskin / hud-reskin / theme-clack snapshot files exist and are committed.

implementation: From repo root run tsc --noEmit, then pnpm lint (knip --strict).
Run the full CLI test suite; confirm theme-parity + all four reskin snapshots + theme-clack snapshot are green.
Run the census greps (picocolors gone; sectionBar/tree/grid/scopeBadge wired per surface; palette values unchanged; @clack control count unchanged).
Fix any small gaps inline (missing import, snapshot drift from a legit change → update snapshot intentionally).

reference.pattern: release-gate discipline: local tsc --noEmit ≠ build; knip --strict dead-code gate; full-suite green before merge

rationale.chosen_approach: Per C-008 each surface owns its snapshot, so F-008 is not a separate authoring phase — it collapses into a single goal-backward verification gate that proves the increments cohere. Mirrors the known pitfall that local build ≠ tsc --noEmit and that knip catches dead deps.

risks: A reskin surface might pass its own task tests but fail the cross-cutting tsc/knip — this gate is exactly where that surfaces.
Snapshot drift from a legitimate change must be intentionally re-blessed, not blindly -u'd.
